'''鈭歷-v-r-th''' ('''kavavrethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:darrain|darrain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:darrain|darrain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-v-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kavavrethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivavrethoko|thivavrethoko]] || [[word:jivavrethoko|jivavrethoko]] || [[word:shivavrethoko|shivavrethoko]] || [[word:kivavrethoko|kivavrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvavrethoko|thuthuvavrethoko]] || [[word:jujuvavrethoko|jujuvavrethoko]] || [[word:shushuvavrethoko|shushuvavrethoko]] || [[word:kukuvavrethoko|kukuvavrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvavrethoko|thuvavrethoko]] || [[word:juvavrethoko|juvavrethoko]] || [[word:shuvavrethoko|shuvavrethoko]] || [[word:kuvavrethoko|kuvavrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvavrethoko|thuvavrethoko]] || [[word:juvavrethoko|juvavrethoko]] || [[word:shuvavrethoko|shuvavrethoko]] || [[word:kuvavrethoko|kuvavrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevavrethoko|thevavrethoko]] || [[word:jevavrethoko|jevavrethoko]] || [[word:shevavrethoko|shevavrethoko]] || [[word:kevavrethoko|kevavrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovavrethoko|thothovavrethoko]] || [[word:jojovavrethoko|jojovavrethoko]] || [[word:shoshovavrethoko|shoshovavrethoko]] || [[word:kokovavrethoko|kokovavrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovavrethoko|thovavrethoko]] || [[word:jovavrethoko|jovavrethoko]] || [[word:shovavrethoko|shovavrethoko]] || [[word:kovavrethoko|kovavrethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovavrethoko|thovavrethoko]] || [[word:jovavrethoko|jovavrethoko]] || [[word:shovavrethoko|shovavrethoko]] || [[word:kovavrethoko|kovavrethoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]] || [[word:vavrethoko|vavrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vavrethoko|th忙vavrethoko]] || [[word:j忙vavrethoko|j忙vavrethoko]] || [[word:sh忙vavrethoko|sh忙vavrethoko]] || [[word:k忙vavrethoko|k忙vavrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavavrethoko|thathavavrethoko]] || [[word:jajavavrethoko|jajavavrethoko]] || [[word:shashavavrethoko|shashavavrethoko]] || [[word:kakavavrethoko|kakavavrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavavrethoko|thavavrethoko]] || [[word:javavrethoko|javavrethoko]] || [[word:shavavrethoko|shavavrethoko]] || [[word:kavavrethoko|kavavrethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavavrethoko|thavavrethoko]] || [[word:javavrethoko|javavrethoko]] || [[word:shavavrethoko|shavavrethoko]] || [[word:kavavrethoko|kavavrethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavavrethithi|shavavrethithi]] || [[word:shavavrethiji|shavavrethiji]] || [[word:shavavrethishi|shavavrethishi]] || [[word:shavavrethiki|shavavrethiki]]
